A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

first Srila Prabhupada book you read ever....?

Other · asked by user [] · 2007-08-10 · 5 answers
Bhagavad gita, gorgeous 1975 edition (in french) could understand very litlle, still I was so atracted.
user [19] · 2007-08-10
Kunti i think. I bought the whole SB afterwards.
user [33] · 2007-08-10

user [112] · 2007-08-10
The science of selfrealisation.
I found at home between my father various yoga books. He started to read it when I become a "devotee".
user [40] · 2007-08-11

user [78] · 2007-08-12
Bhagavad Gita As It Is.

in about, uhmmm, only 6 years.
